title: Breast lump surgical clinic

referral.text: Supports clinician recognition of an unexplained breast lump and age-qualified nipple or skin changes for referral consideration; it does not assert cancer or generate a referral decision.
referral.rationale: Supports clinician recognition of an unexplained breast lump and qualified nipple or skin changes for breast lump surgical clinic; no decision is generated.
referral.evidence_extract: Supports clinician recognition of an unexplained breast lump and age-qualified nipple or skin changes for referral consideration; it does not assert cancer or generate a referral decision.

exact_section.heading: Recommendations 1.4.1–1.4.3 — breast cancer recognition and referral
exact_section.locator: recommendations organised by site, breast cancer section

follow_up.text: Supports documenting warning symptoms, when to return for re-evaluation, agreed review, and patient-initiated review if symptoms recur, persist, worsen, or cause concern.
follow_up.rationale: Supports clinician-documented return advice and agreed review for breast lump surgical clinic; no decision is generated.
follow_up.evidence_extract: Supports documenting warning symptoms, when to return for re-evaluation, agreed review, and patient-initiated review if symptoms recur, persist, worsen, or cause concern.

source_limitations: All item-level mappings remain unsupported pending separate clinician review and signed approval.
Laterality, duration, size, cycle relation, pregnancy, lactation, family history, examination, imaging, pathology, diagnosis, risk and referral decision remain absent.
No diagnosis, risk conclusion, investigation, treatment, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, escalation or disposition is generated for breast lump surgical clinic.
Any legacy item not explicitly mapped to an exact section remains unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, differential, investigation, management decision, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, urgency conclusion, discharge decision, or patient instruction.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
